series_metadata.series_description: Inspection Reports reveal data complied by the examiners during their Inspection of a plant. The form discloses the name and location of the company, date of inspection, as well as, the result of his interview with a representative of the company. Also,

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the AS 400 or Novell computer system, until information is superseded by new information or until records series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain hard copy records for 2 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
